p1.title: No-suffix execution mode contract is contradictory
p1.remediation: Pick one no-suffix behavior and make the top-level description and setup parser match. If the intended behavior is the consolidated prompt, change the default-mode sentence to "No suffix prompts for execution mode."

p1.title: Execution protocol can bypass Markdown-owned setup
p1.remediation: Align the entrypoint with the Mode-Based/deep-review pattern: state that Markdown owns setup first, then load .opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_skill-advisor_{auto,confirm}.yaml only after all setup outputs are resolved.

p1.title: Dry-run phase and output-path contracts disagree
p1.remediation: Define one dry-run contract. Either skip verification everywhere, or run a read-only Phase 4 everywhere; also standardize the proposal path across key behaviors, output formats, examples, next steps, and YAML.

p2.title: Rollback wording alternates between checkout and revert
p2.remediation: Use one rollback instruction or explicitly distinguish "discard local changes" from "revert a committed change" so operators do not run the wrong Git recovery path.
